system.effect: The psyker saps the life force from his target, draining 1d10 wounds from the target and healing himself for the same amount. The target's wounds cannot be reduced below 0 by this power.

description.value: The psyker reaches out with tendrils of warp energy, draining the life essence from his target. The target suffers 1d10 damage, ignoring Toughness Bonus and armour, and the psyker heals wounds equal to the damage inflicted. The psyker cannot exceed his normal maximum wounds.
